titleStmt.title: SII 38.498: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 498. (A.R. No. 498 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Jaṭāvarman Tribhuvanachchakkaravatti Sundara Pāṇḍya. Year: 5, Mīna śu. di, 13, Monday Uttirāḍam = 20th January 1281 A.D. But the month was Makara and not Mīna. The tithi was also ba. di. 13 and not śu. di.

summary.p: This inscription records that Madiyāṇḍāṉ alias Śōṟaṉ Iruṅgōḷaṉ, a Śrutimāṉ, who was having kāṇi right at Nēṟkuḷam in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, sold one fourth of his dry and wet lands and also the residential sites (nattam) at various villages i.e., Neṟkuḷam, Māttikuṟuchchi, and Pudukkuḷam to a certain Śrutimān Dēvaṉporilmigāmaṉ alias Iruṅkōḷaṉ (a resident) of Muṭṭam, a hamlet (situated), to the west of Tiruveḷḷaṟai in Vaḍavaḻi-nāḍu in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu, for 300 paṇam. It is also recorded that the buyer was also vested with the right of sale or gift of the lands he bought.
The seller Mādi Sōṟaṉ Iruṅgōḷaṉ, the village accountant Añju-nāṭṭu-vēḷār, Mādi Teṉṉavarāyaṉ, Tirumēṉi Kumarabālaṉ, and many others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koṟcaṭapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī sun=tara pāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 5vatu miṉa nāyaṟṟu pūruvapakṣattu tri
yodaśiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ vaṭakarai rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu neṟkuḷam kāṇi Uṭai
ya curutimāṉ mātiyāṇṭāṉāṉa coṟaṉ Iruṅkoḷaṉeṉ Innāṭṭu vaṭavaḻināṭṭu tiruveḷḷaṟai melpiṭākai muṭṭamāṉa
nāṭaṟipukaḻnallūr curutimāṉ tevaṉ porilmikāmaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṉukku nāṉ nilavilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Eṉ kāṇiyāṉa
Ūrkaḷil neṟkuḷattil Ūrnattamum ma kāṇilum Eṉṉutāṉa Itil nālil Oṉṟum neṟkuḷattil naṉceyyil Eṉṉutāṉa nilattil nālil
Oṉṟum Ivvūr naṉceynilattu Eṉṉutāṉa caṉṉāta ṉila nālil Oṉṟum Ivvūr puṉceynilattu nāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nilattil Eṉ
ṉutāṉa nilattil nālil Oṉṟum Ivvūr māttikuṟicciyil Eṉṉutāṉa nilattil nālil Oṉṟum putukkuḷattil Eṉṉutāṉa naṉcey puṉ
cey nattam Uḷ(p)paṭṭa nilaṅkaḷil nālil Oṉṟum Ippaṭiyāl vanta naṉcey puṉcey nattam maṉaikaḷukkum maṟṟum Epper
ppaṭṭa pirāttikaḷil nālil Oṉṟum Uḷ(p)paṭa Ivaṟṟai nāḷāl Ivarkku kāṇiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta Aṉṟāṭunaṟkācukku vilai niccaiyi
tta ø3 100 Ippaṇam muṉṉūṟum tiramuṭaiyāṉ Araṅkaṉ cempiyataraiyaṉ kiḻippuṇaiyāka Ivar kaiyile Oru kiḻippaṭa Ippaṇam mu
ṉṉūṟum kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Ippaṭiyāl vanta nilaṅkaḷ Ivarkku tāṉātaṉa vikkiṟaiyaṅkaḷu
kku Urittāvītāka Ippaṇam muṉṉūṟum kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ tevaṉporil mīkāmaṉāṉa Iruṅ
koḷaṉukku māticoṟaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṉeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai māti coṟaṉ Iruṅkoḷaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumeṉi kumara
pālaṉum Aruḷāḷaṉum kaimmāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ivvūr Ūṟk kaṇakku Aiñcunāṭṭu veḷaār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mātiteṉ
ṉavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai malaiyaṉ pañcavarāyaṉ kaimmāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku vaṭakopurattuāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Ip
paṭikku Ivai mātaṇṇaṉ ceramāṉum cellappaṉum kaimmāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ūṟṟattūr kavikumāraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi A
ṟivom nelkuḷattil curutimānkaḷil paratevaṉum ciṅkapperumāḷum cuntarapāṇṭiya pullaaraiyaṉumIt could also be read pallavaraiyaṉumIlañciyattarai
yaṉum Ivarkaḷ kai māṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ivvūr tiruvaṭippiṭikkum nampimāril nilattāya Iruntāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pā
ṭāvūrc curutimān(ṅa)kaḷil nātaṉpāṇṭiyarāyaṉ kaimmāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku nāyaṉkuṟicciuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟive
ṉ tiruppiṭavūr maṉṟaṉ mahādevabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiramuṭaiyāṉ Araṅkaṉ cempiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭi Aṟiveṉ neṟpukkai Uṭaiyāṉ campantap perumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven caivvācāriyamāḻvār parameśvarabhaṭṭar Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Āḻvār tevar kaṇṭabhaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai coṟaṉ Iruṅkoḷar colla Ikkalveṭṭukkuppaṭi Eḻutiṉeṉ .—
koyil kaṇakku nāyaṉkuṟucci Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tokumāmaṇi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ teṉṉavan brahmā
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Irācarācapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ māttyayam tiruveṇṇāvalnampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ koyil nāyakam cempiyaṉ brahmārāṉ E
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Iṉṉā cappācāriyār kāṇi Uṭaiya ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Ākā vallavaāccāriyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 38.498 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
